effect.valoria.nihility_protection.descr:
Nihility Protection: Risk and Reward 
 
 This effect is not mere armor, it is a complex survival method. While active, your passive Nihility accumulation in Valoria is completely paused. However, how it reacts to taking damage depends heavily on the effect's level: 
 
 Levels I & II (Stable State): A moderate portion of incoming damage is blocked, and the kinetic energy of the impact actually reduces your Nihility level. 
 
 Levels III - V (Critical Overload): The shield blocks a massive amount of damage (up to 60% and beyond), but the barrier begins to leak nihility inward. Every hit you take will sharply increase your Nihility level.
 
 Tip: High levels of protection will save you from the lethal, heavy strikes of bosses, but a flurry of quick, weak attacks will instantly drive your Nihility to a fatal threshold.
tooltip.valoria.boss_summon.dimension_fa: Wrong dimension to summon, check the description of item.
codex.valoria.pages:
Find new pages in dungeons, craft items to unlock their info, or get them from defeating bosses. 
 
 Pages marked #ccc087 Random Obtainable /& can drop from dungeon loot as random pages
codex.valoria.pages.name: Pages
codex.valoria.crushables:
Blocks or items that can be crushed using a Stone Crusher to receive random loot. 
 
 The loot depends on the rarity of the crushed item.
codex.valoria.crushables.name: Crushables
codex.valoria.crushables.hint: Search for something that can be crushed.
codex.valoria.king_crab:
Elemental of the Depths, when its health drops below 30 percents has a chance to hide into its shell. 
 
 Attacking it while its hidden will shorten defensive state, while its hidden in the sell it will restore its health
codex.valoria.king_crab.name: King Crab
codex.valoria.devil: Fire elemental, Agile warrior humanoids. They constantly move around the battlefield, strafing to dodge projectiles, and will switch between ranged and melee combat depending on their preferences. Some Devils are specialized Hunters, preferring to stay at range.
codex.valoria.devil.name: Devil
codex.valoria.bosses: This modification introduces a variety of unique bosses into the world. Follow this branch to learn more about each one — their lore and the ways to summon them.
codex.valoria.bosses.name: Bosses
codex.valoria.pick:
Prospectors Pickaxe allows you to excavate ancient artifacts from suspicious-looking stones. 
 Special accessories can accelerate the excavation process.
codex.valoria.pick.name: Prospectors Pick
codex.valoria.heavy_workbench: A workshop for invention. Using blueprints, artifacts, fragments, or rare materials, one can craft powerful items — stronger than most, but far harder to obtain.
codex.valoria.heavy_workbench.name: Heavy Workbench
codex.valoria.nihility_monitor:
It's hard to breath in this dimension... and this air... this suffocating air it affects my organism somehow. 
 I think I can craft something that i will call Nihility monitor, maybe it will help me to track this affliction.
codex.valoria.nihility_monitor.name: Nihility Monitor
codex.valoria.harmony_crown: Winding roots, woven into a crown, radiate ancient power — as if the Mother Nature itself had poured a fragment of its will into them. Once, this crown adorned the brow of the last king of the Ents, who ruled the forests of Arethea.
codex.valoria.harmony_crown.continuation: May awaken the ancient guardian of the forest — #5bb467 Dryador, /& a spirit once bound between roots and time
codex.valoria.harmony_crown.name: Crown of Harmony
codex.valoria.obsidian_heart: It radiates an unbearable, suffocating heat — as if the infernal depths themselves had compressed their fury into a single relic. Legends say this heart was forged in the primordial fires of the Nether by the Valoria goddess itself to seal the Firron.
codex.valoria.obsidian_heart.continuatio: Its searing pulse may awaken the lord of the ashes — #e25822 Firron, /& the Emperor of the Infernal element
codex.valoria.obsidian_heart.name: Obsidian Heart
codex.valoria.dryador:
The conversation failed — Dryador immediately launched into battle without another word. I did not think it would be possible, but I literally killed the Emperor of Nature... Something is definitely wrong here 
 
 if the most peaceable Emperor has gone berserk, we need to investigate further.
codex.valoria.dryador.name: Dryador
codex.valoria.firron: The sovereign of the infernal wastes and the undisputed King of the Piglin race. His very presence turned the air to ash and scorched the lungs. He fought not with the proud strategy of an Emperor, but with the rabid, suffocating fury of a cornered beast.
codex.valoria.firron.name: Firron
codex.valoria.necromancer:
A sorcerer who betrayed the natural balance of life and death. 
 After the Elemental Collapse, as the boundaries between realms thinned, they found in the Void an unending source of necrotic energy
codex.valoria.necromancer_continuation: calling the dead from beneath the earth and granting them life in return for eternal servitude
codex.valoria.necromancer.name: The Necromancer
codex.valoria.necromancer_grimoire:
Not every book is meant to be read. 
 This ash-covered, bloodstained tome is more than an artifact — it’s a vessel for the will of one who once ruled over death itself.
codex.valoria.necromancer_grimoire_conti: #ccc087 To awaken the Necromancer, find buried crypt and place the grimoire upon the ancient altar /& then secrets of forbidden magic rise… along with its master
codex.valoria.necromancer_grimoire.name: Necromancer Grimoire
codex.valoria.necromancer_grimoire.hint: Used by Sorcerers to unlock the secrets of Necromancy...
codex.valoria.suspicious_gem:
A mysterious shard glowing with an alien light. 
 Said to be a fragment of an entity whose name has been erased. 
 Used in an ancient awakening ritual deep within the fortress.
codex.valoria.suspicious_gem_continuatio: Only those brave enough to offer it to the altar will see what lurks beyond the veil of darkness
codex.valoria.suspicious_gem.name: Suspicious Gem
codex.valoria.suspicious_gem.hint: Obtain the Suspicious Gem in the Valoria Fortress
codex.valoria.wicked_crystal:
Once the heart of the fortress — a source of power that shielded the ancient halls from invaders. 
 
 But when the world fell into shadow, its walls became a tomb, and its guardian — a twisted shade.
codex.valoria.wicked_crystal_continuatio:
The crystal, once gleaming with hope, became a seed of ruin, poisoning all it touched. 
 
 Legends say it once carried the will of a vanished civilization... 
 Now, it only whispers of devastation
codex.valoria.wicked_crystal.name: Wicked Crystal
codex.valoria.the_end.name: The End... For Now
codex.valoria.the_end:
Congratulations, you have reached the end of the current content. As the author of this world, I must confess that Valoria's development is entering an indefinite hiatus. Creating a project of this scale completely alone takes an immense toll, and I simply need to step back and recover my strength. 

I am a Ukrainian student, and this mod was built in the most unimaginable conditions — under airstrikes, the constant threat of war, and sudden power outages where hours of unsaved progress would vanish in a second. The pressure of development, combined with the heavy expectations of the community, has left me completely burned out.

But despite it all, I am incredibly grateful. Thank you for playing, and a massive, heartfelt thank you to my Patreon supporters. Your financial support kept the forge burning when everything else was dark. <3
codex.valoria.the_end.history.name: How it started
codex.valoria.the_end.history:
This project has a crazy history. It was literally born inside my little Redmi 9a phone, where I drew the first sprites during school classes. 

In 2022, it took shape as 'DarkRPG', but after a copyright strike from a modpack, it was reborn as Valoria in December 2023. Believe it or not, the core of this mod was coded on an ancient machine: a Pentium E2200, GeForce 8600, and 4GB of RAM. I had to do a lot of freelance commissions just to upgrade my PC and keep the development alive.

For now, I am stepping away from the modding scene to focus on my real life and my path as an Indie Game Developer. The future of Valoria is unwritten, but its foundation is strong. Thank you for everything. Glory to Ukraine!
codex.valoria.undead:
Undead — constructs of bone and magic. Artificial, unstable, they exist only as long as the fading spell sustains them. 
 When the magic wanes, they crumble into dust.
codex.valoria.undead.name: Undead
codex.valoria.cobalt: Cobalt is a durable mid-game ore that can only be mined with a Diamond Pickaxe. It generates deep underground, typically between levels Y -64 and Y 6.
codex.valoria.cobalt_continuation: Its high thermal stability makes it a core component for alloying #ccc087 Black Gold /&, a material essential for powerful elemental infusions.
codex.valoria.cobalt.name: Cobalt
codex.valoria.black_gold:
A dark alloy, forged from cobalt and gold under anomalous conditions. 
 This metal pulses with residual elemental energy and serves as a key to infusion — a process that imbues weapons and artifacts with primordial power.
codex.valoria.black_gold.name: Black Gold
codex.valoria.nature_core:
The fusion of a core with the force of #96fd6e nature /& and harmony enables elemental infusion. 
 To obtain the necessary materials, one must hunt Forest Elementals (Ents).
codex.valoria.nature_core.name: Nature Core
codex.valoria.aquarius_core:
Imbuing the core with the power of #7ebfff the bottomless sea /& opens the path to elemental infusion. 
 To acquire the needed materials, one must defeat Deep Elementals.
codex.valoria.aquarius_core.name: Aquarius Core
codex.valoria.infernal_core:
Scorching the core with #fba000 the fires /& of the underworld initiates elemental infusion. 
 To gather the components, you'll need to slay Fire Elementals (Devils).
codex.valoria.infernal_core.name: Infernal Core
codex.valoria.void_core:
Warping the core with the essence of #7061b7 the Void /& leads to infusion based on the power of nothingness. 
 To gain the materials, one must eliminate Void Elementals.
codex.valoria.void_core.name: Void core
codex.valoria.fortress:
Dark halls that once stood as the bastion of an ancient civilization. 
 Its walls once held the light — now they whisper only of oblivion. 
 The fortress was built as a seal — a bulwark keeping evil beyond the edge of the world.
codex.valoria.fortress_continuation:
Now it’s a tomb of secrets, broken by time and shadow, 
 where the past groans through the cracks in the stone
codex.valoria.fortress.name: Fortress
codex.valoria.fortress.hint: Take a visit to the Void Fortress in the Valoria dimension
codex.valoria.crypt: Crypts — scattered across surface remnants of ancient battles and mass graves, where necromancers perfected their craft — turning tombs into ritual chambers, and corpses into servants.
codex.valoria.crypt_continuation: Many necromancers descended underground, leaving empty tombs
codex.valoria.crypt.name: Crypt
codex.valoria.geodes.desc: Geodes are underground formations, generated in geodites. These intriguing structures hold the potential for rare resources. To unlock their treasures, break geodes using a stone crusher.
codex.valoria.ent:
Is the natural element really the most peaceful one? Because looking at what’s happening with the harmony elementals, it certainly doesn’t seem that way. The forests are wild and enraged.

 Something is definitely wrong here...? 
 
 Perhaps it will be possible to perform a ritual and speak with Dryador?
codex.valoria.ent.name: Ents
codex.valoria.ent.hint: Walking trees, or... whats left of them
codex.valoria.elementals: Nature, water, air, fire — the basic elements. The primal and dangerous form of magic, feared for its untamable power. In the past, great #7061b7 cataclysms /& have occurred from experiments involving even a single element. But what would happen if all of them were used together…
codex.valoria.elementals.continuation: It’s terrifying to imagine. Yet, due to #981a10 anomalies /& whose cause remains unknown, the elements have weakened and are now easier to “tame” than before. This is an incredible, yet at the same time, frightening anomaly. I would very much like to uncover the reason behind it.
codex.valoria.elementals.name: Elementals
codex.valoria.elemental_emperors:
Each element has its own #fcffb3 deity /&, or “Emperor” 
 The Emperors preserve balance and harmony among one another, maintaining a barrier that prevents a certain evil from entering the world.
codex.valoria.elemental_emperors.continu: Perhaps that’s just a lie—meant to keep our kind from prying beyond the limits of our understanding? Who can say…
codex.valoria.elemental_emperors.name: Elemental Emperors
codex.valoria.main.continuation: Every object found, creature encountered, curio or phenomenon—whatever it may be—could prove important and deserves to be noted in the codex!
codex.valoria.main: So as not to get lost in this vast world, I shall begin writing all my discoveries and thoughts in this book, so that nothing is forgotten.
codex.valoria.main.name: Main
codex.valoria.medicine: Craft bandages using aloe pieces and strings. These provide extended regeneration, though less effective than regular regeneration effect.
codex.valoria.medicine.name: Medicine
codex.valoria.treasure.gems: Gems that can drop from bags. And even mined in caves these gems are rare, but jewelry with these gems giving player some bonuses!
codex.valoria.treasure.gems.name: Gems
codex.valoria.treasures: In dungeons you can find treasure bags, in these bags you can find a rare stuff, like gems, these gems can be used to smith a jewelry!
codex.valoria.treasures.name: Treasures
codex.valoria.valoria_portal.name: Valoria Portal
codex.valoria.valoria_portal:
A portal to the forgotten lands, named Valoria. 
 
 World that was eaten by the #7061b7 void /& itself... Be prepared for the increased nihility levels that can cause health problems
codex.valoria.valoria_portal.hint: Obtain - Valoria Portal Frame Shard by slaying the Firron
codex.valoria.jeweler_table.name: Jeweler Table
codex.valoria.jeweler_table: The jeweler table can be used to grant Villagers an additional profession or to craft various trinkets, but keep in mind that it will take some time!
codex.valoria.jeweler_table.villager: The Jeweler is a villager who specializes in trinkets and shiny gems, and can sell you some true rarities!
codex.valoria.stone_crusher.name: Stone Crusher
codex.valoria.stone_crusher: To use the Stone Crusher firstly place a gem, or a geode, then click [RMB] while holding Pickaxe in hand
codex.valoria.kiln.name: Kiln
codex.valoria.kiln: The Kiln is used to bake runic molds. These molds are essential for crafting charged runes, which grant their wearer special abilities.
codex.valoria.alchemy_station.name: Alchemy Station
codex.valoria.alchemy_station: The Alchemy Station is used to brew various potions and craft alchemical gear. Currently, it's unable to process most recipes... it seems I need to upgrade it.
codex.valoria.nether_alchemy.name: Nether Alchemy
codex.valoria.nether_alchemy: I've upgraded the Alchemy Station. Now I am able to craft new potions and gear using materials from the Nether.
codex.valoria.elemental_alchemy.name: Elemental Alchemy
codex.valoria.elemental_alchemy: I can now craft new potions and gear by infusing them with elemental powers. Runes would be the best choice to experiment with!
codex.valoria.valoria_alchemy.name: Valoria Alchemy
codex.valoria.valoria_alchemy: Eureka! What if I use Nihility itself to infuse my potions and gear? This should protect me better as I explore this dimension and uncover the secrets it holds.
codex.valoria.shade_blossom.name: Shade Blossom
codex.valoria.shade_blossom:
Worth collecting.
 Using it's leaves in alchemy allows you to brew Clarity Vials, which cleanse minor #7061b7 Nihility /& or purify rotten food.
codex.valoria.shade_blossom_seeds: You can extract Shade Blossom seeds to cultivate your own that later can be used for your own needs.
codex.valoria.survival.name: Survival
codex.valoria.survival: Surviving in Valoria requires more than just a sword. The environment itself can be your greatest enemy. Watch out for environmental hazards and keep your supplies fresh.
codex.valoria.nihility.name: Nihility
codex.valoria.nihility:
Valoria is saturated with #7061b7 Nihility /& — a corruptive force that eats away at the soul. 
 
 As your Nihility level rises, you may experience #981a10 health problems /&, blindness, or even be expelled from the dimension entirely.
codex.valoria.nihility_continuation: To survive, seek gear with #7ebfff Nihility Resistance /& or consume cleansing items. Some raw foods from the Overworld can even increase your corruption!
codex.valoria.rotting.name: Contamination
codex.valoria.rotting:
The air of Valoria is toxic to organic matter. Overworld food will slowly #981a10 rot /& over time, losing its nutritional value and eventually turning into useless Rot. 
 
 Keep an eye on the contamination level in the tooltips. Once it reaches 100%, the food is gone for good. Local Valoria flora is much more stable
codex.valoria.combat.name: Combat Fundamentals
codex.valoria.combat: Battles in this world are decided by more than just strength. Understanding your attributes and your enemy's weaknesses is the key to victory.
codex.valoria.attributes.name: Attributes
codex.valoria.attributes:
Beyond Strength and Haste, you possess unique RPG attributes: 
 
 #fcffb3 Dodge /&: Chance to completely avoid incoming attacks. 
 #ccc087 Accuracy /&: Reduces the chance of missing your targets.
codex.valoria.elemental_combat.name: Elemental Mastery
codex.valoria.elemental_combat: Enemies often have #981a10 Elemental Weaknesses /&. For example, forest-dwelling creatures like Ents are particularly vulnerable to #fba000 Axes /& and Fire damage. Similarly, stone-skinned Golems can be effectively cracked with a #fba000 Pickaxe /&.
codex.valoria.elemental_combat_continuat: Using the right element or tool can multiply your damage output significantly. Always experiment with different weapon types against unknown foes.
codex.valoria.archaeology.hint: A pickaxe that is used for archaeology
codex.valoria.medicine.hint: Collect some aloe that can be found in desert
codex.screen.valoria_progression.descrip: Are you sure you want to change this? This will disable codex progression for all the players
Are you sure you want to change this? This will enable codex progression for all the players
codex.valoria.shade_blossom.hint: Collect some shade blossoms in Shade Forest
codex.valoria.elemental_manipulator.hint: A block that is able to manipulate elemental power
codex.valoria.warrior_arsenal.name: The Warrior's Arsenal
codex.valoria.warrior_arsenal: The mod adds a vast array of RPG-style weaponry, but their unique mechanics aren't always obvious. Mastering these specialized tools is the key to surviving the aberrations of Valoria.
codex.valoria.katanas.name: Katanas
codex.valoria.katanas: Speed is life. #ccc087 Katanas /& allow for a quick dash that pierces through enemies, while #ccc087 Rapiers /& reward precision. Mastering the timing of these dashes can mean the difference between a clean kill and a counter-attack.
codex.valoria.scythes.name: Scythes
codex.valoria.scythes: Not just for the harvest. #ccc087 Scythes /& perform a wide circular strike, making them ideal for dealing with multiple surrounding enemies. However, their weight makes them slower than a standard weapons.
codex.valoria.spears.name: Spears
codex.valoria.spears: Keep the enemy at arm's length. #ccc087 Spears /& provide superior reach and can be thrown to pin down distant foes. #ccc087 Glaives /& offer similar range with more sweeping power, perfect for keeping territorial hunters at bay.
codex.valoria.soul_arts.name: The Soul Arts
codex.valoria.soul_arts: The boundary between life and death is thin in this world. By harvesting and manipulating the very essence of your foes, you can unlock powers that transcend the physical realm.
codex.valoria.soul_essence.name: Undead Essence
codex.valoria.soul_essence: In this shattered world, death is rarely the end. By using a #7ebfff Soul Collector /&, one can harvest the lingering essence of defeated entities. These souls are the fuel for ancient technologies long thought lost.
codex.valoria.soul_infuser.name: The Soul Infuser (Unfinished)
codex.valoria.soul_infuser: A machine of transition. The #7ebfff Soul Infuser /& allows you to channel harvested souls into your equipment, granting them charging them using Soul Energy of the fallen enemies
codex.valoria.bloodborne_path.name: The Bloodborne Path
codex.valoria.bloodborne_path: As you delve deeper into the corruption, you will find materials that pulse with a malevolent life of their own. This is the path of the Bloodborne, where the line between hunter and hunted blurs.
codex.valoria.colossi_remains.name: Remains of the Colossi
codex.valoria.colossi_remains: The red planet's gaze has birthed monstrosities—huge, infected remains that litter the twisted biomes. Harvesting these #981a10 Remains /& is dangerous, as they pulse with a corruption that hungers for life.
codex.valoria.crimtane_forging.name: Forging with Corruption
codex.valoria.crimtane_forging: By fusing Black Gold with Pain Crystals and the Remains of the fallen, one can forge #981a10 Crimtane /&. This alloy is resilient to the worst of the Void's influence, but its creation requires stepping into the heart of the plague.
codex.valoria.bestiary.name: World Bestiary
codex.valoria.bestiary: The fauna of the old world was not spared. Corruption forced creatures to adapt or perish, turning the survivors into fiercely territorial hunters.
codex.valoria.scavengers.name: The Scavengers
codex.valoria.scavengers: Not all that lives in the Void is a monster by birth. #ccc087 Scavengers /& are what remains of those who tried to survive the Collapse. They are territorial and cunning, often found guarding the ruins of their former homes.
codex.valoria.flesh_sentinels.name: Flesh Sentinels
codex.valoria.flesh_sentinels: In the Meaty Lands, the environment itself is alive. #981a10 Flesh Sentinels /& are the immune system of this biological nightmare—implacable guardians that see you as nothing more than an infection to be purged.
codex.valoria.elemental_manipulator.name: Elemental Manipulator
codex.valoria.elemental_manipulator: A craft station forged entirely of Black gold, designed to channel and manipulate elemental powers.
codex.valoria.keg.name: Brewery
codex.valoria.keg: The Keg is used to brew various drinks, usually alcoholic. Drinking them can be a double-edged sword, reducing your armor while increasing your damage. Use them wisely.
codex.valoria.chronicles.name: Chronicles of the Collapse
codex.valoria.chronicles: The world was not always this way. Fragments of history can still be found in the ruins, telling the tale of a reality torn asunder.
codex.valoria.elemental_collapse.name: The Elemental Collapse
codex.valoria.elemental_collapse: It wasn't a war, but a failure of balance. When the Elemental Emperors' harmony shattered, reality tore open. What we call Valoria is the scar left behind—a world where the laws of nature have been replaced by the #7061b7 hunger of the Void /&.
codex.valoria.crafting.name: Crafting
codex.valoria.crafting: This mod introduces a lot of new crafting ways that you will discover by continuing with this branch
codex.valoria.red_gaze.name: The Red Gaze
codex.valoria.red_gaze: Look not at the red planet for too long. It is said to be the source of the #981a10 Celestial Plague /&, a sentinel of a higher power watching our world rot. Its presence in the sky marks the areas where the corruption is strongest.
codex.valoria.soul_arts.hint: Discover the secrets of soul manipulation
codex.valoria.scavenger.hint: Encounter some Scavengers in the ruins
codex.valoria.bloodborne_path.hint: Venture into the heart of corruption
codex.valoria.flesh_sentinel.hint: Survive the gaze of the Flesh Sentinels
codex.valoria.soul_collector.hint: Craft a Soul Collector to harvest essence
codex.valoria.remains.hint: Collect the remains of the fallen Colossi
codex.valoria.king_crab.hint: Greedy king in the beach, with claws.
codex.valoria.jade.name: Jade
codex.valoria.jade: A rare gemstone found deep within the Valoria earth. It is harder than netherite and can be used to craft powerful tools.
codex.valoria.jade.hint: Shiny green gem found in the depths of Valoria.
codex.valoria.pearlium.name: Pearlium
codex.valoria.pearlium: A lustrous metal often found in oceanic deposits. It is durable and highly resistant to corrosion.
codex.valoria.pearlium.hint: Pearl deposits inside a crystalline stone that can be found in the ocean as a disks
codex.valoria.materials.name: Materials
codex.valoria.materials: This mod introduces a lot of new materials follow this branch to obtain all of them.
codex.valoria.nature_golem.name: Nature Golem
codex.valoria.nature_golem: A massive guardian made of earth and vine, bound by ancient magic to protect the forests.
codex.valoria.nature_golem.hint: A guardian made of earth and vine
codex.valoria.river_golem.name: River Golem
codex.valoria.river_golem: Found near large bodies of water, these golems are built from river stones and are exceptionally strong.
codex.valoria.river_golem.hint: A sentinel of the flowing waters
codex.valoria.swamp_wanderer.name: Swamp Wanderer
codex.valoria.swamp_wanderer: Drowned poor zombies in the Swamps.
codex.valoria.lithic_runes.name: Lithic Runes
codex.valoria.lithic_runes: A lithic rune is the simplest form of magic bound into stone.
codex.valoria.runes.name: Elemental Runes
codex.valoria.runes: A more advanced form of magic bound into stone, capable of holding Elemental Power.
codex.valoria.void_slate_runes.name: Void Slate Runes
codex.valoria.void_slate_runes: What if we used a stone capable of holding nihility itself to bind runic power? Eureka!
codex.valoria.rot.name: Rot
codex.valoria.rot: It seems that in this dimension, food rots because of the harsh air. Or perhaps it is due to the Nihility corruption that kills everything organic...? I think I can experiment with local plants in alchemy. Maybe I can find a way to revert the Rot?
codex.valoria.goblin.name: Goblin
codex.valoria.goblin: Small and agile, goblins are often found in small groups. They are known for their greed and love for shiny objects.
codex.valoria.goblin.hint: A small, greedy creature of the forests
codex.valoria.troll.name: Troll
codex.valoria.troll: Trolls inhabit dark places and are known for their hiding abilities those species have learned some tactics to become invisible and attack form the back!.
codex.valoria.troll.hint: A glowing eyes in the dark
codex.valoria.corrupted.name: Corrupted
codex.valoria.corrupted: Creatures that have been completely consumed by the #981a10 Celestial Plague /&. They are aggressive and spread corruption.
codex.valoria.corrupted.hint: A soul consumed by the celestial plague
codex.valoria.corrupted_troll.name: Corrupted Troll
codex.valoria.corrupted_troll: A troll that has fallen to the corruption, making it even more aggressive and dangerous.
codex.valoria.corrupted_troll.hint: A troll twisted by dark forces
codex.valoria.scourge.name: Scourge
codex.valoria.scourge: A dreadful creature of the swamps. Upon death, its bloated belly bursts open, releasing a swarm of Maggots...
codex.valoria.scourge.hint: A bloated wanderer roaming the swamps.
codex.valoria.shadewood_spider.name: Shadewood Spider
codex.valoria.shadewood_spider: A large spider that makes its home in the #2f313a Shadewood /& forests...
codex.valoria.shadewood_spider.hint: A spider that blends into the dark woods
codex.valoria.wicked_scorpion.name: Wicked Scorpion
codex.valoria.wicked_scorpion: Found in the ruins of ancient deserts, these scorpions are larger and much more venomous than their common counterparts.
codex.valoria.wicked_scorpion.hint: A venomous inhabitant of the Valoria deserts
codex.valoria.draugr.name: Draugr
codex.valoria.draugr: Ancient undead warriors that still guard their tombs. They are resilient and skilled in combat.
codex.valoria.draugr.hint: Ancient warriors that refuse to rest
codex.valoria.sorcerer.name: Sorcerer
codex.valoria.sorcerer: Undead practitioners of dark magic. They can cast various spells and summon minions to aid them.
codex.valoria.sorcerer.hint: Wielders of dark and forbidden arts
codex.valoria.pyratite.name: Pyratite
codex.valoria.pyratite: A volatile and extremely hot material found in the deepest layers of the world. It is used to craft high-tier explosives and heavy weaponry.
codex.valoria.pyratite.hint: A volatile material from the depths
codex.valoria.ancient_metals.name: Ancient Metals
codex.valoria.ancient_metals: Relics of a forgotten civilization. Ancient Ingots and Relic Gold can be found in long-abandoned ruins and used to restore powerful artifacts.
codex.valoria.ethereal.name: Ethereal
codex.valoria.ethereal: A material that exists between worlds. Ethereal Shards can be used to craft tools and weapons that defy conventional physics.
codex.valoria.ethereal_shard: Ethereal Shards are the material needed for #7ebfff Ethereal /& equipment. They can be obtained from slaying Necromancer.
